currentBosses.note: SEED data, not a frozen/verified source. This is a plausible current raid rotation for the round-2 'This week's raid bosses' home card, not scraped from a live feed. OPERATOR: update this file's formId/tier/endsAt entries whenever the in-game raid rotation changes, then rebuild (PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pogo_encyclopedia.assemble). Unknown formIds fail the build loudly by design.
